Summary:
Experiment off-main-thread-decompression-experiment
StartDate 2024-06-28
EndDate 2024-07-29
Channel nightly
Branches control-all-main-thread treatment-a-all-omt treatment-b-omt-decompression
All
metric
branch All results compared against control.
uplift
effect size (mwu) Effect size calculated by Rank Biserial Correlation.
perf_page_load_time_ms Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.
treatment-a-all-omt
+2.9%
Small (r=0.03)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-9.4%
Medium (r=-0.07)
perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms Time in milliseconds from responseStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.
treatment-a-all-omt
+3.3%
Small (r=0.04)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-10.1%
Medium (r=-0.06)
perf_first_contentful_paint_ms The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
treatment-a-all-omt
+2.8%
Small (r=0.02)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-3.8%
Small (r=-0.02)
perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms The time between responseStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
treatment-a-all-omt
+3.1%
Small (r=0.02)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-0.9%
Small (r=0.01)
perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms The time between navigationStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
treatment-a-all-omt
+4.1%
Small (r=0.04)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-3.5%
Medium (r=-0.05)
perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms The time between responseStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
treatment-a-all-omt
+5.7%
Small (r=0.05)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
+1.0%
Small (r=-0.03)
network_dns_start In the HTTP page channel, time from connection open to the DNS request being issued. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_ISSUE_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).

-4.4%
Small (r=0.04)

network_dns_end In the HTTP page channel, time from the DNS request being issued to the response. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_LOOKUP_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
-20.3%
Small (r=0.03)

networking_dns_lookup_time Time for a successful DNS resolution (msec) | Migrated from Firefox Telemetry's `DNS_LOOKUP_TIME`.

network_dns_start In the HTTP page channel, time from connection open to the DNS request being issued. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_ISSUE_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
+29.5%
Small (r=-0.01)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-26.8%
Small (r=0.02)
network_dns_end In the HTTP page channel, time from the DNS request being issued to the response. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_LOOKUP_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
-10.5%
Small (r=-0.01)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-5.4%
Small (r=-0.02)
networking_dns_lookup_time Time for a successful DNS resolution (msec) | Migrated from Firefox Telemetry's `DNS_LOOKUP_TIME`.
treatment-a-all-omt
+30.0%
Small (r=0.05)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
+13.3%
Small (r=0.02)
networking_transaction_wait_time Time from submission to dispatch of transaction without HTTPS RR (ms)
treatment-a-all-omt
+374.9%
Small (r=-0.01)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
+75.3%
Small (r=-0.02)
network_tcp_connection In the HTTP page channel, time from the TCP SYN packet is received to the connection is established and ready for HTTP. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_TCP_CONNECTION_2 in Desktop (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
-13.3%
Medium (r=-0.07)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-15.1%
Small (r=-0.05)
network_tls_handshake In the HTTP page channel, time from after the TCP SYN packet is received to the secure connection is established and ready for HTTP. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_TLS_HANDSHAKE in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
-16.1%
Medium (r=-0.09)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-8.2%
Small (r=-0.02)
networking_http_channel_page_open_to_first_sent Time in milliseconds from AsyncOpen to first byte of request sent, applicable for page loads without HTTPS RR
treatment-a-all-omt
+1.9%
Small (r=-0.02)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-12.6%
Small (r=0.01)
networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent Time in milliseconds from AsyncOpen to first byte of request sent, applicable for sub-resource loads without HTTPS RR
treatment-a-all-omt
+314.2%
Medium (r=-0.07)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
+2657.3%
Small (r=0.02)
performance_pageload_fcp The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
treatment-a-all-omt
-3.1%
None (p=0.15)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-6.2%
Small (r=-0.03)
perf_largest_contentful_paint Time from navigation start to largest contentful paint.
treatment-a-all-omt
+1.9%
None (p=0.63)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-0.8%
Small (r=-0.02)
fcp_time Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.
treatment-a-all-omt
-0.6%
None (p=0.85)
treatment-b-omt-decompression
-4.4%
Small (r=-0.03)
lcp_time Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.

+0.7%
None (p=0.46)

Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment",
    "histograms": {
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from responseStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between responseStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between responseStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_start": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "In the HTTP page channel, time from connection open to the DNS request being issued. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_ISSUE_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_end": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "In the HTTP page channel, time from the DNS request being issued to the response. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_DNS_LOOKUP_TIME in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.networking_dns_lookup_time": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time for a successful DNS resolution (msec) | Migrated from Firefox Telemetry's `DNS_LOOKUP_TIME`.\n",
            "kind": "numerical",
            "max": 60000
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.networking_transaction_wait_time": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time from submission to dispatch of transaction without HTTPS RR (ms)\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.network_tcp_connection": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "In the HTTP page channel, time from the TCP SYN packet is received to the connection is established and ready for HTTP. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_TCP_CONNECTION_2 in Desktop (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.network_tls_handshake": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "In the HTTP page channel, time from after the TCP SYN packet is received to the secure connection is established and ready for HTTP. Corresponds to Legacy histogram HTTP_PAGE_TLS_HANDSHAKE in Desktop. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_page_open_to_first_sent": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from AsyncOpen to first byte of request sent, applicable for page loads without HTTPS RR\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from AsyncOpen to first byte of request sent, applicable for sub-resource loads without HTTPS RR\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical",
            "max": 50000
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.perf_largest_contentful_paint": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time from navigation start to largest contentful paint.\n",
            "kind": "numerical",
            "max": 50000
        }
    },
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 20000
        },
        "lcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 20000
        },
        "load_time": {
            "desc": "Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "response_time": {
            "desc": "Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 20000
        }
    },
    "segments": [
        "All",
        "Windows",
        "Linux",
        "Mac"
    ],
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2024-06-28",
    "endDate": "2024-07-29",
    "channel": "nightly",
    "branches": [
        {
            "name": "control-all-main-thread"
        },
        {
            "name": "treatment-a-all-omt"
        },
        {
            "name": "treatment-b-omt-decompression"
        }
    ],
    "include_null_branch": false
}
  

  with desktop_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as d
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
, android_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as f
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  (
    SELECT * from desktop_eventdata
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * from android_eventdata
  )
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 20000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with desktop_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as d
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
, android_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as f
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  lcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  (
    SELECT * from desktop_eventdata
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * from android_eventdata
  )
WHERE
  lcp_time >= 0 AND lcp_time <= 20000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with desktop_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as d
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
, android_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as f
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  (
    SELECT * from desktop_eventdata
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * from android_eventdata
  )
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with desktop_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as d
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
, android_eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as f
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  response_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  (
    SELECT * from desktop_eventdata
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * from android_eventdata
  )
WHERE
  response_time >= 0 AND response_time <= 20000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
      `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
,
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_start.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_start is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_start.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_start is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_end.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_end is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_end.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_dns_end is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_dns_lookup_time.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_dns_lookup_time is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_dns_lookup_time.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_dns_lookup_time is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_transaction_wait_time.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_transaction_wait_time is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_transaction_wait_time.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_transaction_wait_time is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_tcp_connection.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_tcp_connection is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,

      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_tcp_connection.values)
    WHERE

      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_tcp_connection is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)

    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL

    ) s
GROUP BY

ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_tls_handshake.values)
    WHERE

      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_tls_handshake is not null

        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count

      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.network_tls_handshake.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.network_tls_handshake is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0

FROM
    (

    ) s
GROUP BY

ORDER BY

  with

        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count

      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_page_open_to_first_sent.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"

        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count

      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_page_open_to_first_sent.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_page_open_to_first_sent is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null

ORDER BY

        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null

    SELECT

        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.networking_http_channel_sub_open_to_first_sent is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null

    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
desktop_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.perf_largest_contentful_paint.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.perf_largest_contentful_paint is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
),
android_data as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
      CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.perf_largest_contentful_paint.values)
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-06-28')
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-07-29')
      AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
      AND metrics.timing_distribution.perf_largest_contentful_paint is not null
      AND ARRAY_LENGTH(ping_info.experiments) > 0
      AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "off-main-thread-decompression-experiment").branch is not null
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM desktop_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM android_data
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
